summary: Strong client growth and trading activity fail to lift stockCharles Schwab Corporation (NYSE:SCHW) reported record second-quarter revenue and earnings on Tuesday, exceeding Wall Street expectations as client assets, account growth and trading activity continued to accelerate. headline: Charles Schwab (NYSE:SCHW) Beats Q2 CY2026 Sales Expectations
summary: Financial services giant Charles Schwab (NYSE:SCHW) announced better-than-expected revenue in Q2 CY2026, with sales up 20.9% year on year to $7.07 billion. Its non-GAAP profit of $1.62 per share was 4.5% above analysts’ consensus estimates.
